raw_consumer_statement:
To whom it may concern : I am extremely frustrated with Barclays, Customer Service, and the Office Of The President. I have called and left you guys several recorded voicemails which I have recorded for my record. In addition, I have sent you guys several emails to this email address as well as messages on XXXX XXXX. 

To this date which is XXXX  XX/XX/year> I have yet to receive a call back from you guys as I have requested. This is absolutely unacceptable. 


I have two claims which I will list the claim numbers below. 

Claim # : XXXX Claim # : XXXX For both claims above, Barclays is stating to me the following : We received the response from the merchant providing details which confirmed that the services were provided as agreed upon. 

Additionally, as the merchants terms and conditions of the service were accepted by you, we determined that we were unable to assist, closed the case, and the provisional credits were reversed. 



However, you have not provided me any documentation regarding 1 ) The merchants alleged terms and conditions which you referenced above nor have you provided me with 2 ) Anything where it shows that I have signed and agreed to these alleged terms and conditions. 



According to my rights as a credit card holder within the United States, this is illegal. You are simply doing nothing but passing the buck. 



I have attached the two most recent documents that you guys have provided to me in response to the complaint I filed with the United States consumer finance. 



I will be expecting a call back at your earliest convenience. Otherwise, I may have to pursue other avenues to address this issue in accordance with my legal rights. 



Thank you, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
